meaning: n.[鐢焆(鍒嗘暎)楂樺皵鍩轰綋,缃戜綋
examples: Meanwhile, dictyosome secreted vesicles into the vacuoles.
During past years, much valuable information has been obtained on the function of dictyosome in plant cell.
Reaction product of acid phosphatase is localized primarily in the small vacuoles, and occasionally in the dictyosome cisternae and vesicles of the golgi body.
